e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: BML source can now express a two-parameter integer method and a two-argument call, bind both parameters in the source compiler and Hati native lowerer, reject arity mismatch before native table emission, and execute the packed call through fk-icall with the same result as the BMA path.
public_endpoints: not-public-endpoint: local Form/BML/Hati compiler proof surface
test_flows: Parse two-parameter BML method and two-int call into method-two-param-return-add and return-call-two-int source rules.
Compile source through BMA and verify bml-compile-nodes returns 42.
Lower to Hati native table and verify bml-hati-run-value returns 42.
Inspect table tags for fk-icall and fk-nth so the binary shape proves packed argument flow.
Verify Sum(19) is rejected as call/arity before valid table emission.
